creator: giffunip@asme.org
text:
It seems that the crosscompiled programs build without using the 
crosscompiler but don't do their work correctly.
Since a native linux gdb is included in the distribution, I suggest to
nuke linuxgdb. A patch for scogdb follows.

How-To-Repeat: BTW. Please change all ocurrences of pgiffuni@FPS.biblos.unal.edu.co to
giffunip@asme.org, I won't be using the former as frequently. Please 
don't forget to change it in the additional contributors list also.
